name: Touchdown Chocolate Bars
recipeIngredient: 14 oz Eagle Brand Sweetened Condensed Milk (NOT evaporated milk)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Combine flour, sugar, and cocoa. Cut in margarine until crumbly.
3. Add egg; mix until well blended. Reserve 1½ cups crumb mixture.
4. Press remainder evenly on bottom of greased 13x9-inch baking pan.
5. Bake for 10 minutes.
6. In saucepan, combine Eagle Brand and 1 cup Hershey's Chocolate Chips.
7. Over low heat, cook and stir until chips melt and mixture is smooth.
8. Spread evenly over prepared crust.
9. Add nuts and remaining 1 cup Hershey's Chocolate Chips to reserved crumb mixture; sprinkle evenly over top.
10. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until center is set.
11. Cool. Cut into bars. Store covered at room temperature.
